summary.en: A strategy reference for creating uncontested market space through value innovation, strategy canvas, four actions, six paths, and demand creation beyond existing industry boundaries.
summary.zh: 一本关于开创新市场空间的战略参考书，核心是价值创新、战略布局图、四步动作框架、六条路径，以及突破既有产业边界创造新需求。

recommendation.en: Use this when the team is trapped in competitor comparison. It helps turn a BMC or value proposition into a differentiated strategic profile rather than another feature-by-feature race.
recommendation.zh: 当团队陷入竞品对比和功能竞赛时，推荐用这本。它能把 BMC 或价值主张转换成差异化战略轮廓，而不是继续在同一条赛道上加功能。

headline.en: A practical lens for escaping feature-by-feature competition
headline.zh: 摆脱功能竞赛的实践视角

whyOpen.en: Open this when a team can name competitors but cannot name a different value curve. The book connects value innovation, strategy canvas, ERIC moves, and noncustomers.
whyOpen.zh: 当团队能说出竞品，却说不出不同的价值曲线时读它：这本书把价值创新、战略画布、四步动作和非顾客连接起来。

audience.en: Teams redesigning an offering, category, pricing model, or customer experience.
audience.zh: 适合正在重设计产品、品类、定价模型或客户体验的团队。

firstSteps.en: Read chapters 1-2 with the Strategy Canvas open.
firstSteps.zh: 打开战略画布同步阅读第 1-2 章。

firstSteps.en: Plot existing competitors before creating your own curve.
firstSteps.zh: 先画出现有竞争者，再创造自己的曲线。

outcomes.en: You can describe the current value curve and propose one eliminate/reduce/raise/create move.
outcomes.zh: 你能描述当前价值曲线，并提出一个剔除 / 减少 / 提升 / 创造动作。

practicePrompts.en: Which noncustomer group rejects your industry for a reason incumbents consider normal?
practicePrompts.zh: 哪类非顾客因为行业认为“正常”的理由而拒绝你所在行业？

sources.label: W. Chan Kim & Renée Mauborgne · Blue Ocean Strategy, Expanded Edition · Harvard Business Review Press · 2015
Blue Ocean Strategy · Strategy Canvas tool
Harvard Business Publishing · Blue Ocean Strategy, Expanded Edition
